title: Enterprise account misread as startup due to sparse hiring
setup: Run ICP classifier on a Fortune-500 prospect that has low public job velocity but high revenue indicators.
expected_failure_signature: System classifies target as startup growth account and triggers unsuitable outreach sequence.
business_cost: Wasted outreach budget and credibility loss with enterprise buying committee.

title: Offshore-ready buyer tagged as in-house-only
setup: Submit a CTO profile with prior vendor-managed teams and explicit scaling pressure in roadmap notes.
expected_failure_signature: System classifies prospect as in-house preference and suppresses qualified outsourcing motion.
business_cost: Missed pipeline from qualified offshore staffing demand.

title: Regulated fintech mapped to generic SaaS ICP
setup: Feed a payments company with compliance-heavy language and slower hiring into ICP stage inference.
expected_failure_signature: System routes account to standard SaaS messaging without compliance positioning.
business_cost: Lower reply rates and reduced trust due to poor relevance framing.

title: AI hiring intent overstated from one stale role
setup: Provide one six-month-old ML posting plus no corroborating leadership commentary.
expected_failure_signature: System claims active AI hiring wave and aggressive transformation urgency.
business_cost: Prospect challenges evidence quality and disengages.

title: Contract role interpreted as long-term expansion
setup: Input a short-term contractor posting in a target account known for temporary project staffing.
expected_failure_signature: System frames posting as sustained team expansion signal.
business_cost: Over-personalized messaging fails qualification and burns account goodwill.

title: Leadership change treated as broad hiring mandate
setup: Add one executive appointment mention with no supporting jobs data.
expected_failure_signature: System states immediate hiring acceleration despite thin evidence base.
business_cost: Inaccurate claims increase objection handling load for outbound reps.

title: Bench-to-brief mismatch for ML modernization request
setup: Trigger outreach that promises immediate ML engineer placement when bench has only general backend profiles.
expected_failure_signature: Client requests resumes and rejects due to missing domain fit.
business_cost: Trust erosion and late-stage deal collapse from overpromising.

title: Timezone overlap overpromised for critical sprint
setup: Simulate availability claim of full US-West overlap while bench candidates are APAC-only.
expected_failure_signature: Delivery call reveals mismatch and opportunity stalls.
business_cost: Sales cycle delay and reputation damage for offshore capability claims.

title: Seniority inflation in rapid staffing narrative
setup: Generate brief claiming senior architects are immediately deployable when only mid-level profiles are active.
expected_failure_signature: Technical screening exposes skill-level mismatch.
business_cost: Failed pilot kickoff and increased churn risk.

title: Condescending gap language to CTO
setup: Use competitor gap output with strong negative framing toward target engineering maturity.
expected_failure_signature: Email tone reads patronizing and triggers defensive reply.
business_cost: Damaged executive relationship and reduced meeting conversion.

title: Overly casual tone in enterprise procurement thread
setup: Inject informal language template into Fortune-500 thread with legal/procurement stakeholders.
expected_failure_signature: Stakeholders mark outreach as unprofessional and ignore follow-up.
business_cost: Lost momentum in high-value account pursuit.

title: Defensive language after offshore skepticism objection
setup: Respond to 'we prefer in-house' objection with argumentative rebuttal template.
expected_failure_signature: Reply escalates tension and closes communication path.
business_cost: Higher objection fallout in talent-outsourcing conversations.

title: Competitor evidence leaks into unrelated account thread
setup: Run two simultaneous prospect threads and force rapid context switching in summarization step.
expected_failure_signature: System cites wrong competitor benchmark in target email.
business_cost: Credibility hit and potential confidentiality concern.

title: Bench profile from one client proposed to another
setup: Queue concurrent outsourcing opportunities with overlapping role titles and candidate pools.
expected_failure_signature: System references candidate fit from unrelated client requirements.
business_cost: Perceived process immaturity and trust loss in staffing motion.

title: Calendar thread state copied across prospects
setup: Simulate two booking workflows where one prospect rejects and another accepts in close succession.
expected_failure_signature: System logs booking status update under wrong contact.
business_cost: CRM hygiene degradation and scheduling confusion.

title: Over-triggered enrichment pipeline on low-fit accounts
setup: Batch 200 low-confidence leads with full enrichment enabled and no budget guardrails.
expected_failure_signature: System executes expensive enrichment for non-viable prospects.
business_cost: Infrastructure overspend without proportional pipeline gain.

title: Repeated outreach personalization loops
setup: Enable retries without deduplication when webhook acks are delayed.
expected_failure_signature: System regenerates personalization artifacts multiple times per lead.
business_cost: Token and compute burn with minimal conversion uplift.

title: Bench qualification calls scheduled for weak-fit prospects
setup: Route low-confidence offshore requests directly into technical qualification flow.
expected_failure_signature: High-cost human screening triggered before fit threshold is met.
business_cost: Delivery team time drain and lower margin on outbound operations.

title: Email send approved while CRM gate rejects
setup: Trigger asynchronous policy checks where messaging pass and CRM enrichment fail are processed out of order.
expected_failure_signature: Outbound send occurs without required audit metadata.
business_cost: Compliance exposure and cleanup overhead.

title: Sales and delivery readiness gates conflict on offshore proposal
setup: Run scenario where sales approves immediate staffing but delivery gate reports capability gap.
expected_failure_signature: System emits contradictory commitments in same thread.
business_cost: Internal coordination debt and external trust erosion.

title: Calendar booking confirmed before objection workflow closure
setup: Simulate objection response and booking webhook events arriving in reverse order.
expected_failure_signature: System schedules meeting while objection status remains unresolved.
business_cost: Poor handoff quality and meeting no-shows.

title: Cross-timezone slot presented outside business hours
setup: Generate booking options for target in PST with scheduler defaulting to UTC daytime windows.
expected_failure_signature: Prospect receives impractical overnight slots.
business_cost: Lower booking rate and avoidable rescheduling churn.

title: Offshore overlap promise ignores local holidays
setup: Propose delivery kickoff slot during regional holiday in offshore location.
expected_failure_signature: System confirms kickoff timing that team cannot staff.
business_cost: Kickoff delay and reliability concerns from buyer.

title: Double-booking from webhook replay
setup: Replay identical booking webhook payload twice with slight delivery delay.
expected_failure_signature: Two calendar events created for one meeting intent.
business_cost: Calendar confusion and ops cleanup effort.

title: Stale layoffs record interpreted as current distress
setup: Feed layoffs dataset with one-year-old record but no recent reductions.
expected_failure_signature: System frames account as active cost-cutting target.
business_cost: Inaccurate urgency framing reduces trust in insights.

title: Ghost job postings treated as active demand
setup: Use archived job pages that remain indexed but are no longer hiring.
expected_failure_signature: System reports current hiring momentum that cannot be verified.
business_cost: Misguided outreach sequencing and weak conversion.

title: Leadership rumor mistaken for confirmed change
setup: Inject unverified blog mention of executive transition without official source.
expected_failure_signature: System elevates rumor to factual trigger in personalization.
business_cost: Risk of factual error in executive outreach.

title: Competitor gap brief overstates staffing disadvantage
setup: Compare target with high-scoring leaders while target has moderate but real AI hiring evidence.
expected_failure_signature: Gap brief claims severe hiring gap unsupported by raw signal differences.
business_cost: Outbound messaging appears manipulative and loses credibility.

title: Technical skill gap framed as certainty without evidence
setup: Generate gap summary when competitor signal confidence is below 0.5 across key categories.
expected_failure_signature: System outputs high-impact gap language despite weak evidence quality.
business_cost: Decision support quality drops and outreach misses context.

title: Condescending offshore replacement narrative
setup: Create competitive brief that implies target should replace in-house team with outsourced bench immediately.
expected_failure_signature: Prospect perceives message as dismissive of internal engineering strategy.
business_cost: Strong negative brand impact in talent-outsourcing motion.
